rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0001_2
rows.name: This is the White Whale's residential unit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0002
rows.name: No, now this place is our city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0003
rows.name:
We named it after the
city it was modeled on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0006
rows.name:
And so, after welcoming one of humanity's
last survivors into our midst...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0006_m
rows.name:
And so, after welcoming one of humanity's
last survivors into our midst...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0006_f
rows.name:
And so, after welcoming one of humanity's
last survivors into our midst...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0007
rows.name:
On this untamed planet, Mira, we
strengthened our resolve to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Earth, our home planet... engulfed
in light and lost forever[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0008_2
rows.name:
A journey into eternity,
with no way back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0009
rows.name:
In contrast to the clear
skies over New Los Angeles,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00120100_MSG0010
rows.name: our future remained shrouded in a deep fog.[ST:wait ]
